channel.title: Pages on Robin's Space
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Robin's Space

item.title: About
item.description:
Hey, I’m Robin 👋

Builder, photographer, and lifelong tinkerer.

I spend my days building products at the intersection of technology and creativity. This site is where I share what I’m learning, what I’m building, and what I’m seeing through my lens.

What You’ll Find Here

📝 Blog — Deep dives into tech, AI, cloud architecture, and the occasional hot take.

🛠 Projects — Things I’ve built, from side projects to serious products.

📷 Photography — Moments captured. Mostly street, travel, and architecture.

Get in Touch

Feel free to reach out via GitHub or LinkedIn.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
AWS Solutions

China CloudFront SSL Plugin V2

面向中国区 CloudFront 的一站式免费 SSL 证书管理方案。V2 带来多项目统一管理、GUI 界面和 Access Key 认证。

🔗 GitHub | Blog Post

Tags: AWS, CloudFront, SSL, Serverless

China CloudFront SSL Plugin

中国区 CloudFront 免费 SSL 证书部署插件（第一代）。解决免费 SSL 证书使用和自动更新的功能缺失问题。

🔗 GitHub | Blog Post

Tags: AWS, CloudFront, SSL

Deploy GGUF Model to SageMaker

使用 llama.cpp 在 SageMaker 上部署 GGUF 量化模型进行推理。

🔗 Blog Post

Tags: AWS, SageMaker, LLM, GGUF

WordPress GenAI Plus

为 WordPress 添加 AI 内容生成能力的插件。

🔗 Blog Post

Tags: WordPress, GenAI, AWS Bedrock
